memory.summary: My plan to finish the assignment analysis before reading is now interrupted by a friend's invitation for lunch.
I made progress on the assignment analysis, but my friends have now gathered and are ordering food, creating a new social commitment.

The analysis section is finally complete, but my zero energy and two hours of sleep debt mean I cannot immediately tackle the remaining tasks.
Despite working 1.5 hours on assigned reading, my progress is negligible (0.04), and I remain at zero energy with high stress.
